articles.title: CVE-2026-31429
articles.summary:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net: skb: fix cross-cache free of KFENCE-allocated skb head

SKB_SMALL_HEAD_CACHE_SIZE is intentionally set to a non-power-of-2
value (e.g. 704 on x86_64) to avoid collisions with generic kmalloc
bucket sizes. This ensures that skb_kfree_head() can reliably use
skb_end_offset to distinguish skb heads allocated from
skb_small_head

articles.title: CVE-2025-13480
articles.summary:
Fudo Enterprise in versions from 5.5.0 through 5.6.2 allows low privileged users to access certain administrator-only resources via improperly protected API endpoints. This includes sensitive information such as system logs and parts of system configuration settings.
This vulnerability has been fixed in version 5.6.3

articles.title: CVE-2026-5967 — CVSS 8.8
articles.summary: ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware developed by TeamT5 has an Privilege Escalation vulnerability. Authenticated remote attackers with shell access can inject OS commands and execute them with root privileges.

articles.title: CVE-2026-39454 — CVSS 7.8
articles.summary: SKYSEA Client View and SKYMEC IT Manager provided by Sky Co.,LTD. configure the installation folder with improper file access permission settings. A non-administrative user may manipulate and/or place arbitrary files within the installation folder of the product. As a result, arbitrary code may be executed with the administrative privilege.

articles.title: Microsoft releases emergency updates to fix Windows Server issues
articles.summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band (OOB) updates to fix issues affecting Windows Server systems after installing the April 2026 security updates. [...]

articles.summary: ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware developed by TeamT5 has an Arbitrary File Deletion vulnerability. Authenticated remote attackers with web access can exploit Path Traversal to delete arbitrary files on the system.

articles.summary: EasyFlow .NET developed by Digiwin has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read, modify, and delete database contents.

articles.title: CVE-2026-6644 — CVSS 9.1
articles.summary: A command injection vulnerability was found in the PPTP VPN Clients on the ADM. The vulnerability allows an administrative user to break out of the restricted web environment and execute arbitrary code on the underlying operating system. This occurs due to insufficient validation of user-supplied input before it is passed to a system shell. Successful exploitation allows an attacker to achieve Rem

articles.title: CVE-2026-6643 — CVSS 9.9
articles.summary:
A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability was found in the VPN Clients on the ADM. The issue stems from the use of unbounded sscanf() and passing user-controlled data directly to printf(). Due to the lack of PIE and Stack Canary protections, an authenticated remote attacker can exploit these to execute arbitrary code as the web server user. 
Affected products and versions include: from ADM 4.1.0

articles.title: CVE-2024-7083 — CVSS 3.5
articles.summary: The Email Encoder  WordPress plugin before 2.3.4 does not sanitise and escape some of its settings, which could allow high privilege users such as admin to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks even when the unfiltered_html capability is disallowed (for example in multisite setup).

articles.summary: Initialization of a resource with an insecure default vulnerability exists in SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. When the affected device is connected to the network with the initial (factory-default) configuration, the device can be configured with the null string password.

articles.title: CVE-2026-20122: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs Vulnerability
articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an incorrect use of privileged APIs vulnerability due to improper file handling on the API interface of an affected system. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a malicious file on the local file system. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to overwrite arbitrary files on the affected system and gain vmanage user privileges. Affe

articles.title: CVE-2026-20133: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor Vulnerability
articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to view sensitive information on affected systems. Affected product: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager by Cisco. Required action: Please adhere to CISA’s guidelines to assess exposure and mitigate risks associated with Cisco SD-WAN devices as outlines in CISA’s

articles.title: CVE-2025-2749: Kentico Xperience Path Traversal Vulnerability
articles.summary: Kentico Xperience contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated user's Staging Sync Server to upload arbitrary data to path relative locations. Affected product: Kentico Xperience by Kentico. Required action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailabl

articles.title: CVE-2023-27351: PaperCut NG/MF Improper Authentication Vulnerability
articles.summary: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class. articles.summary: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the user's session, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive information. articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a storing passwords in a recoverable format vulnerability that allows an authenticated, local attacker to gain DCA user privileges by accessing a credential file for the DCA user on the filesystem as a low-privileged user. articles.title: CVE-2025-32975: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) Improper Authentication Vulnerability
articles.summary: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow attackers to impersonate legitimate users without valid credentials. Affected product: KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) by Quest. Required action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product

articles.title: CVE-2024-27199: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability
articles.summary: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed. Affected product: TeamCity by JetBrains. Required action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
